name: US Cash Advance
description_short: Detroit-area cash advance and payday loan broker connecting borrowers with third-party lenders. Accepts all credit types; same-day funding on loans up to $1,000.
description_long:
US Cash Advance operates physical retail locations, including a Detroit branch at 20002 Schoolcraft Rd, with a separate corporate address listed in Charlotte, NC. The company functions primarily as a loan-matching intermediary: customers fill out an inquiry form and are connected to third-party lenders rather than borrowing directly from US Cash Advance. This broker model means the company itself sets no rates or terms — those are determined by whichever lender accepts the application.

The core product lineup includes payday loans and cash advance loans capped at $1,000, same-day loans, and bad credit personal loans marketed at $250 to $50,000. All products are advertised as unsecured and open to all credit types, including poor credit. The stated process is five steps: submit an online inquiry form, get matched to a third-party lender, review the offer, sign the contract, and receive funds. In-person service is also available at the Detroit location during extended hours.

The Detroit location stands out for its unusually broad operating hours — Monday through Friday 8am to 9pm, and weekends 10am to 7pm — making it accessible to borrowers who cannot visit during standard business hours. Multiple customer reviews specifically commend an in-branch staff member named Doris for clear explanations, transparent terms, and a no-pressure approach. Several reviewers reported receiving funds within a couple of hours of visiting in person, and a 4.4 aggregate rating reflects generally positive service experiences.

Borrowers should approach with eyes open. Because US Cash Advance acts as a broker, APR ranges, fees, and repayment terms are not disclosed anywhere on the website — a meaningful transparency gap for a payday loan product. The company's listed contact email uses a development/staging server domain (kinsta.cloud), which is unusual for a consumer financial services provider. Payday and cash advance loans inherently carry high annualized rates, and the lack of upfront rate disclosure makes comparison shopping difficult before submitting personal information.
address: 3521 N Blackstone Ave unit A, Fresno, CA 93726

company_info.headquarters: 3521 N Blackstone Ave unit A, Fresno, CA 93726

pros: Extended hours Mon–Fri 8am–9pm and weekends 10am–7pm at the Detroit location
All credit types accepted, including bad credit and no-credit-check options
No collateral required on any loan product
Same-day funding reported by multiple reviewers within a couple of hours
In-person service available with staff who explain repayment terms clearly (per reviews)
Minimum paperwork process with a simple five-step online inquiry flow
4.4 aggregate customer rating with multiple first-hand positive experiences cited
cons: Broker model — loan terms, APRs, and fees are set by undisclosed third-party lenders, not US Cash Advance
No APR or fee ranges disclosed anywhere on the website before application
Contact email uses a staging/development server domain (kinsta.cloud), raising operational credibility concerns
Charlotte, NC corporate address does not match the Detroit storefront, creating geographic confusion
One review mentions a cramped waiting area; no online pre-approval available per reviewer feedback
best_for: Bad-credit borrowers in the Detroit area needing $100–$1,000 quickly
People who need same-day cash and cannot qualify for bank loans
Borrowers who prefer in-person service outside standard banking hours
Consumers comfortable being matched to a third-party lender network
diagnosis: US Cash Advance is best for Detroit-area borrowers with poor or no credit who need small emergency funds ($100–$1,000) quickly and prefer in-person assistance during extended hours. The main caveat is that this is a lead-generation broker, not a direct lender — actual loan terms and APRs come from undisclosed third parties and are not shown before you apply, so borrowers should read any offer carefully before signing.
services: In-person loan processing at Detroit storefront
Online inquiry form with third-party lender matching
